CAT Engine stands for Clearly A Terrible Engine. The more you know.

> [!NOTE] 
> Fun Fact :  
> Cat engine has an unoffical name : CATGIRL Engine.  
> Clearly A Terribly, Greatly, Incredibly Re-Liable Engine  
> As I said, *the more you know*.

You can find all the [documentation](/Docs/README.md) for the CAT Engine here, how lucky !
